description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named go that runs on push to master and remove-autoconf branches and on pull requests to master. Use a ubuntu-20.04 job with a matrix strategy for libde265-version 1 and 2, setting environment variables WITH_LIBDE265, WITH_X265, WITH_GRAPHICS, and GO. Check out the repository, set up Go 1.10, install dependencies, prepare CI, and run tests using scripts.
